mapper.select: SELECT dish.id,dish.name,dish.category_id,dish.price,dish.image,dish.description,dish.status,dish.update_time,category.name AS category_name FROM dish LEFT JOIN category ON dish.category_id = category.id WHERE dish.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM setmeal_dish INNER JOIN setmeal ON setmeal_dish.setmeal_id = setmeal.id WHERE setmeal_dish.dish_id = #{id}
